purpose: Map canonical column-edge witnesses into global 900-carrier source artifacts.
boundary: This does not close Gap A.
This maps column-edge witnesses into global carrier sources.
This is still not a full global source-law predicate evaluation.

claim.short_form: Column-edge witnesses have been checked against the global 900-carrier sources.
claim.not_closed_reason: Global carrier hits are still witness evidence, not a full global source-law predicate evaluation.
